summary: The South Bay funding surge continues: AI startups dominated March and April, with Nexthop AI (Santa Clara) raising $500M and Rhoda AI (Palo Alto) closing a $450M Series A. Chip and robotics plays also thrived—SiFive snagged $400M, while Mind Robotics landed $500M. Most South Bay firms remain in hiring mode, signaling confidence despite broader market churn.
